name: §6Lion
description:
§8Foraging Pet

§7Strength: §c50
§7Ferocity: §c+[Ferocity]
§7Speed: §f+25

§6Primal Force
§7Adds §c+20 ❁ Damage §7and §c+20 ❁
§cStrength §7to your weapons.

§6First Pounce
§7First Strike, Triple-Strike, and
§d§lCombo §7are §a100% §7more effective.

§6King of the Jungle
§7Deal §c+150% ❁ Damage §7against mobs
§7that have attacked you.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Black Lion Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to §aLion
§7pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
